build_system: Vite for frontend, tsx for server, npm scripts
verification_instructions: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to check for type errors. Run `npm run build` to verify Vite build succeeds.
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification is TypeScript compilation and Vite build.
key_patterns: i18n uses useT() hook with keys defined in src/i18n/en.ts (source of truth for TranslationKey type) and src/i18n/es.ts. MainMenu.tsx uses state variables for online-create mode. Server uses LobbyConfig interface with availableClans. CLANS array has 8 clans. shuffle() from utils/gameLogic is available.
directory_structure: src/components/ - React components; src/server/ - Express+WS server; src/i18n/ - translations; src/utils/ - game logic; src/types/ - TypeScript types
